# Acid Wash

**Summary**: The use of hydrochloric acid to dissolve carbonate minerals and determine their percentage in a sample.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1988-darwish|Darwish, 1988]] applied acid wash to 8 rock samples to quantify carbonate content.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Determined that Dolomitic green mudstone (Sample 4) contained 31% carbonate. ([[1988-darwish|Darwish, 1988, p. 186]])
